notes: A — notes relinked (2 notes directly on dup company)
B — users relinked (2 users parented to dup)
C — notes via user (1 user on dup + 1 note on that user)
D — clean merge (no notes no users)
E — multiple dups (Dup1 has 1 note Dup2 is clean)
F — non-existent TARGET (expect: skipped section in preview)
G — non-existent DUPLICATE (expect: Skip badge in group card)
H — ALL dups not found (expect: group shown but merge controls hidden)
I row1 — same target + same dup (expect: validation warning)
I row2 — same target + same dup again (expect: deduped into 1 group with 1 dup)
J — same target + different dup (expect: merged into 1 group with 2 dups)
